en.title: Knockdown effect and breadth across stimulation states
en.description: A 2D dot plot displaying 15 genes on the y-axis against three stimulation conditions (Rest, Stim 8hr, Stim 48hr) on the x-axis. Dot size encodes the number of differentially expressed genes (10, 100, or 1,000), and dot color represents signed on-target effect size using a diverging red-blue colorbar, with all plotted values shown in blue (negative effect).
en.data_explanation: This visualization maps the breadth and magnitude of CD4+ T-cell transcriptional response to perturbation of candidate target genes across resting and activated states. The prevalence of negative (blue) effect sizes indicates suppressive knockdown effects on T-cell activation markers, critical for identifying genes whose inhibition could dampen excessive immune responses in CD4+ T-cell-mediated disorders.

zh.title: 敲除效應與刺激狀態間的廣度
zh.description: 一個2D散點圖，y軸顯示15個基因，x軸顯示三種刺激條件(Rest、Stim 8hr、Stim 48hr)。點的大小編碼差異表達基因的數量(10、100或1,000)，點的顏色代表使用發散紅藍色條的有向on-target效應大小，所有繪製值均顯示為藍色(負效應)。
zh.data_explanation: 此視覺化圖表呈現CD4+ T細胞對候選目標基因擾動在靜息和活化狀態間的轉錄反應廣度與幅度。負(藍色)效應大小的普遍存在指示敲除對T細胞活化標誌物的抑制效應，這對於識別其抑制可以削弱CD4+ T細胞介導的疾病中過度免疫反應的基因至關重要。

en.title: Pseudo-volcano: CD4+ T-cell targets by on-target effect size and DE-gene count
en.description: Scatter plot with points colored by three experimental conditions (Rest, Stim 8hr, Stim 48hr); open circles indicate off-target-flagged observations (excluded). X-axis represents on-target effect size (signed; negative values indicate knockdown); y-axis shows DE-gene count on log10 scale. A dashed horizontal gate line marks the ≥50 DE-gene threshold. Selected targets are labeled (SENP5, CCNC, ELAVL1, ARHGAP30, TRIP12, CD2, SFXN1, HNRNPA2B1).
en.data_explanation: The plot ranks CD4+ T-cell target candidates by the breadth of transcriptional perturbation (y-axis: number of differentially expressed genes) relative to on-target knockdown potency (x-axis: effect size). Targets crossing the ≥50 DE-gene threshold represent candidates with substantial downstream impact, informing selection of high-priority targets for functional validation in CD4+ T-cell biology.

zh.title: 偽火山圖：CD4+ T細胞靶點按on-target效應大小與DE基因計數
zh.description: 散點圖，點依三個實驗條件（Rest、Stim 8hr、Stim 48hr）著色；開圓圈表示off-target標誌的觀察值（已排除）。X軸代表on-target效應大小（帶符號；負值表示敲降）；Y軸為對數10刻度的DE基因計數。虛線水平閾值線標記≥50 DE基因閾值。選定靶點標示為SENP5、CCNC、ELAVL1、ARHGAP30、TRIP12、CD2、SFXN1、HNRNPA2B1。
zh.data_explanation: 該圖按轉錄擾動廣度（Y軸：差異表達基因數）相對於on-target敲降效力（X軸：效應大小）對CD4+ T細胞靶點候選進行排序。跨越≥50 DE基因閾值的靶點代表具有實質性下游影響的候選，用於指導在CD4+ T細胞生物學中進行功能驗證的高優先級靶點的選擇。

en.title: Distribution of Downstream DE Genes Across Three Conditions
en.description: Violin plot comparing the distribution of downstream differentially expressed (DE) genes across three conditions: Rest, Stim 8hr, and Stim 48hr. The y-axis shows the count of downstream DE genes plus 1 on a logarithmic scale, with median markers displayed as crosses for each condition.
en.data_explanation: The analysis identifies downstream DE genes for each of three CD4+ T-cell activation conditions (Rest: n=10,344; Stim 8hr: n=10,423; Stim 48hr: n=10,379). The near-complete overlap in distributions indicates that most perturbations trigger weak downstream effects, which is critical for understanding the functional hierarchy of gene regulatory networks and identifying robust transcriptional targets for CD4+ T-cell engineering.

zh.data_explanation: 分析識別三種CD4+ T細胞活化條件的下游DE基因（Rest：n=10,344；Stim 8hr：n=10,423；Stim 48hr：n=10,379）。分佈中的近乎完全重疊表明大多數擾動引發弱下游效應，這對於理解基因調控網路的功能層級和識別CD4+ T細胞工程的穩健轉錄標靶至關重要。

en.title: Q-Q Plot: On-Target Effect Size Distribution Across CD4+ T-Cell Conditions
en.description: Three-panel Q-Q plot comparing on-target effect size distributions across three experimental conditions: Rest (n=6,063, R²=0.901), Stim 8hr (n=6,290, R²=0.902), and Stim 48hr (n=6,410, R²=0.897). Each panel plots observed on-target effect sizes (y-axis) against normal theoretical quantiles (x-axis) with a black reference line; all three conditions exhibit heavy left tails extending to approximately −60, indicating substantial deviation from normality.
en.data_explanation: The Q-Q plots reveal that on-target effect sizes in CD4+ T cells deviate significantly from a normal distribution under all three conditions, with pronounced left-tail skewing suggesting a subset of genes with strong negative effects. This non-normality is consistent across resting and stimulated states (8 and 48 hours), indicating that standard parametric assumptions may be violated and that robust or non-parametric methods are warranted for target discovery. The comparable R² values (0.90+) and similar tail behavior across conditions suggest the deviation is a intrinsic feature of the genomic response landscape rather than condition-dependent noise.

zh.title: Q-Q 圖：CD4+ T 細胞不同條件下靶向效應量分佈
zh.description: 三面板 Q-Q 圖，比較三種實驗條件下靶向效應量分佈：靜息態（n=6,063, R²=0.901）、刺激 8 小時（n=6,290, R²=0.902）及刺激 48 小時（n=6,410, R²=0.897）。各面板繪製觀測靶向效應量（y 軸）對上正態理論分位數（x 軸）的關係，並附黑色參考線；三種條件均呈現左尾延伸至約 −60，表現顯著偏離常態分佈。
zh.data_explanation: Q-Q 圖顯示 CD4+ T 細胞中的靶向效應量在三種條件下均明顯偏離常態分佈，呈現顯著的左尾偏斜，提示具有強負效應的基因子集存在。此非常態性在靜息狀態和刺激狀態（8 小時及 48 小時）間保持一致，指示標準參數假設可能被違反，因此建議採用穩健或非參數方法進行靶標發現。跨條件的可比 R² 值（0.90+）和相似的尾部行為表明，此偏離是基因組反應景觀的內在特徵，而非條件依賴之雜訊。

en.title: On-target effect size across conditions for 15 prioritized targets
en.description: Strip/jitter plot showing on-target effect size (y-axis, negative values indicate knockdown) across three conditions: Rest (n=14), Stim 8hr (n=13), and Stim 48hr (n=15). Black horizontal lines mark the median effect size per condition.
en.data_explanation: Each point represents the on-target knockdown effect for one of 15 prioritized CD4+ T-cell targets that maintained strong knockdown across all three conditions. The distribution and median effect sizes across resting, 8-hour stimulated, and 48-hour stimulated states reveal target robustness and condition-specific efficacy, critical for selecting targets that sustain functional perturbation during T-cell activation.

zh.data_explanation: 每個點代表15個優先CD4+ T細胞目標中一個目標的on-target knockdown效應，這些目標在三種條件下都維持強大的knockdown效果。靜息、8小時刺激和48小時刺激狀態下的分佈和中位數效應大小揭示了目標的穩健性和條件特異性效力，這對選擇在T細胞激活過程中維持功能性擾動的目標至關重要。

en.title: Marimekko Mosaic Treemap of DE-Stat Rows by Culture Condition and On-Target Effect
en.description: A Marimekko/mosaic treemap with three columns representing culture conditions (Rest: 11,287; Stim8hr: 11,415; Stim48hr: 11,281 rows), each subdivided into two on-target effect categories: no on-target knockdown (no knockdown: 4,281/4,133/3,969) and on-target (has knockdown: 6,869/7,154/7,193). Rectangle area is proportional to the count of DE-stat rows (n=33,983 total), with color encoding culture condition; a red diagonal marks approximately 384 suspected off-target rows (~1%).
en.data_explanation: This visualization stratifies differential-expression statistics by stimulation state (rest versus 8-hour and 48-hour stimulation) and on-target knockdown efficacy, revealing how transcript-level perturbation outcomes distribute across experimental conditions. The large prevalence of on-target-effect rows across all conditions highlights which stimulation states yield interpretable, on-target gene-silencing results—critical for prioritizing CD4+ T-cell targets with robust, reproducible knockdown phenotypes in functional screening.

en.title: Sequential QC-Filtering Funnel for CD4+ T-Cell Target Discovery
en.description: A 5-stage sequential filtering funnel (Sankey diagram) showing differential-expression quality control from left to right: All DE rows (33,983) → cells ≥200 (30,515) → significant on-target (19,297) → no off-target (16,998) → DE genes ≥50 (2,131). Blue bands represent rows passing each gate; gray bands show rows dropped at each stage (−3,468; −11,218; −2,299; −14,867). Band width encodes the count of rows passing or removed, with 6.3% of input rows retained through all filters.
en.data_explanation: This QC pipeline identifies high-confidence CD4+ T-cell target genes by progressively filtering a differential-expression dataset: removing genes expressed in fewer than 200 cells, retaining only statistically significant on-target calls, excluding off-target hits, and finally selecting genes with ≥50 differential-expression support. The steep attrition (93.7% filtered) illustrates the stringency required to isolate robust, cell-type-specific therapeutic targets from genome-wide DE analysis.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞靶點發現的逐序QC篩選漏斗
zh.description: 一個5階段逐序篩選漏斗（Sankey圖）展示由左至右的差異表現品質控制：全部DE列(33,983) → 細胞≥200(30,515) → 統計顯著的靶上(19,297) → 無靶外(16,998) → DE基因≥50(2,131)。藍色帶狀表示通過各閘門的列；灰色帶狀顯示各階段刪除的列(−3,468；−11,218；−2,299；−14,867)。帶寬編碼通過或移除的列數，輸入列的6.3%保留至所有篩選完成。
zh.data_explanation: 此QC管線藉由逐步篩選差異表現資料集來識別高信度CD4+ T細胞靶點基因：移除在少於200個細胞中表現的基因、僅保留統計顯著的靶上呼叫、排除靶外命中、最後選擇具≥50差異表現支持度的基因。陡峭的衰減(93.7%已篩選)凸顯了從全基因組DE分析中分離出穩健、細胞型特異性治療靶點所需的嚴格程度。

en.title: Parallel-coordinates plot of CD4+ T-cell activation metrics across stimulation conditions
en.description: Parallel-coordinates plot with three axes — cell count, |on-target effect|, and DE gene count — each scaled to percentiles (0–100) with 5th, 50th, and 95th percentile marks. Thin gray lines represent ~500 sampled rows per condition; thick colored lines overlay the per-condition median trajectories: blue for Rest, orange for Stim8hr, and green for Stim48hr.
en.data_explanation: Each trajectory traces how cell abundance, on-target effect magnitude, and differential-expression burden co-vary within a condition. The median profiles reveal whether stimulation shifts the population toward higher on-target activity and broader transcriptional change, helping identify which CD4+ T-cell states achieve strong on-target effects while minimizing off-target DE — a key trade-off for CD4+ target discovery.

zh.title: CD4+ T 細胞活化指標平行座標圖（跨刺激條件）
zh.description: 平行座標圖，包含三條軸線——細胞計數、|on-target effect| 和 DE gene count——各軸均按百分位數（0–100）縮放，標示第 5、50 和 95 百分位數刻度。薄灰線代表每個條件下約 500 個採樣列；粗彩色線疊加顯示各條件的中位軌跡：藍色表示 Rest、橙色表示 Stim8hr、綠色表示 Stim48hr。
zh.data_explanation: 每條軌跡追蹤細胞豐度、on-target effect 幅度和差異表達負擔如何在條件內共變。中位輪廓揭示刺激是否將群體轉移向更高的 on-target 活性和更廣泛的轉錄變化，有助於識別哪些 CD4+ T 細胞狀態能在達到強 on-target effect 的同時將 off-target DE 最小化——這是 CD4+ 靶標發現的關鍵權衡。

en.title: CD4+ T-Cell Target Perturbations: Four-Dimensional Classification by Culture, On-Target Effect, DE-Gene Grade, and Filter Status
en.description: Parallel-categories diagram displaying 33,983 CD4+ T-cell target perturbations across four dimensions: culture condition (Rest, Stim8hr, Stim48hr), on-target effect presence (has/no on-target), differential-expression gene-count grade (no effect, 1 DE, 2–10 DE, >10 DE), and filter threshold outcome (passed, not passed). Bands are colored by culture condition with width proportional to row counts.
en.data_explanation: The visualization stratifies genome-wide perturbation outcomes by transcriptional response magnitude and experimental validation status. Prioritizing targets with on-target effect and >10 DE genes passing the filter threshold (n=2,131) identifies high-confidence candidate genes for CD4+ T-cell functional studies, while the full distribution reveals how culture condition and response intensity trade off against filtering stringency across all 33,983 perturbations.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞標靶擾動：按培養條件、靶點效應、DE基因等級和篩選狀態進行四維分類
zh.description: 平行類別圖展示33,983個CD4+ T細胞標靶擾動，涵蓋四個維度：培養條件（Rest、Stim8hr、Stim48hr）、靶點效應存在狀況（有/無靶點效應）、差異表現基因計數等級（無效應、1個DE、2–10個DE、>10個DE）及篩選閾值結果（通過、未通過）。帶狀圖以培養條件著色，寬度與列計數成正比。
zh.data_explanation: 此視覺化依據轉錄反應幅度和實驗驗證狀態對全基因組擾動結果進行分層。優先選擇具有靶點效應且DE基因>10個、通過篩選閾值的標靶（n=2,131），可識別用於CD4+ T細胞功能研究的高可信度候選基因；完整分佈則揭示文化條件和反應強度如何在全部33,983個擾動中與篩選嚴謹性相互制衡。

en.title: Pearson Correlation Heatmap of CD4+ T-Cell Target Discovery Metrics
en.description: A single-panel Pearson correlation heatmap displaying pairwise correlations among six features: Cells assayed, Genes up, Genes down, Total DE genes, On-target effect, and Downstream genes. Color intensity and numerical values indicate correlation strength between each pair of metrics.
en.data_explanation: The heatmap reveals relationships between experimental and computational outputs in CD4+ T-cell target discovery workflows. The perfect correlation (1.00) between Total DE genes and Downstream genes indicates redundancy, while patterns among other metrics (cell counts, directional gene changes, on-target effects) inform feature selection and workflow optimization for robust target prioritization.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞標靶發現指標之皮爾遜相關性熱圖
zh.description: 單面板皮爾遜相關性熱圖，顯示六個特徵間的成對相關性：Cells assayed、Genes up、Genes down、Total DE genes、On-target effect 及 Downstream genes。色彩強度與數值表示各指標對間的相關強度。
zh.data_explanation: 熱圖揭示 CD4+ T細胞標靶發現工作流程中實驗與計算輸出間的關係。Total DE genes 與 Downstream genes 間的完美相關性（1.00）表示冗餘性，而其他指標間的模式（細胞計數、方向性基因變化、靶向效應）則有助於特徵選擇與工作流程最佳化，以實現穩健的標靶優先排序。

en.title: Top DE Gene Targets across TCR Stimulation Conditions
en.description: Clustered heatmap of ~15 top differentially expressed genes (rows: VAV1, CD247, LAT, CD3E, PLCG1, PMVK, UBXN1, TADA2B, SGF29, DENR, CCNC, MED12, SENP5, SUPT20H, TADA1) across 3 conditions (Rest, Stim8hr, Stim48hr), with cells annotated by raw DE-gene counts. A log-scale magma colormap encodes the count intensity, row dendrogram shows hierarchical clustering, and a green box highlights the TCR-signaling cluster.
en.data_explanation: Each cell value represents the total number of differentially expressed genes for that target in each condition, revealing how stimulation duration reshapes the transcriptional landscape of CD4+ T-cells. The log-scale visualization emphasizes dynamic targets with large fold-changes in DE burden, critical for prioritizing which genes drive TCR-dependent activation and which sustain the prolonged response.

zh.data_explanation: 每個細胞值代表該靶點在各條件下差異表達基因的總數，揭示刺激時長如何重塑 CD4+ T 細胞的轉錄景觀。對數尺度可視化強調動態靶點的 DE 負擔中的大幅折疊變化，有助於確定哪些基因驅動 TCR 依賴性活化，以及哪些基因維持延長的反應。

en.title: Pearson Correlation Matrix of CD4+ T-Cell Target Features
en.description: A 6×6 symmetric heatmap displaying Pearson correlations between six target-discovery features: Genes down, Genes up, Total DE genes, Downstream genes, Cells assayed, and On-target effect. A column dendrogram clusters features hierarchically, grouping the four differential-expression metrics together. Cell values range from −0.02 to 1.00, with a color scale indicating correlation strength.
en.data_explanation: The correlation matrix reveals how target-selection metrics co-vary across the screening dataset. The dendrogram's tight clustering of DE-count metrics (Genes down, Genes up, Total DE genes, Downstream genes) indicates these measures are highly interdependent, while weaker or negative correlations with On-target effect and Cells assayed highlight trade-offs between potency and assay scale—critical relationships for prioritizing CD4+ T-cell targets with robust and specific activity.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞目標特徵的Pearson相關矩陣
zh.description: 一個6×6對稱熱圖，顯示六個目標發現特徵間的Pearson相關係數：Genes down、Genes up、Total DE genes、Downstream genes、Cells assayed和On-target effect。列樹狀圖以階層式分群方式將特徵聚集，將四個差異表現指標分組在一起。細胞值範圍從−0.02到1.00，配色刻度表示相關強度。
zh.data_explanation: 相關矩陣揭示目標篩選指標在篩選資料集中的共變方式。樹狀圖對DE計數指標（Genes down、Genes up、Total DE genes、Downstream genes）的緊密聚集表明這些測量方式高度相互依存，而與On-target effect和Cells assayed的較弱或負相關則突顯效力與分析規模之間的權衡——這些是優先選擇具有穩健且特異性活性的CD4+ T細胞目標的關鍵關係。

en.title: Hexbin Density: Cells Assayed vs. DE Gene Breadth Across CD4+ Targets
en.description: Hexbin density plot mapping cells assayed per target (X-axis, log scale) against total differentially expressed genes per target (Y-axis, log scale). Hexagon bins are colored by target density (log scale). A dashed horizontal line indicates the median of 2 DE genes, revealing the distribution of transcriptomic perturbation breadth relative to experimental depth.
en.data_explanation: The plot reveals how experimental sample size (cells assayed) correlates with the transcriptomic scope (DE gene count) of CD4+ T-cell target perturbations. Targets clustered near the median DE threshold inform which candidate targets achieve focused, reproducible transcriptomic effects—a key criterion for selecting targets with interpretable and targetable mechanisms in CD4+ biology.

zh.title: 六邊形密度圖：CD4+ 靶標檢測細胞數 vs. 差異表達基因廣度
zh.description: 六邊形密度圖繪製每個靶標檢測的細胞數（X軸，對數尺度）與每個靶標差異表達基因總數（Y軸，對數尺度）的關係。六邊形區間按靶標密度（對數尺度）著色。虛線表示2 DE genes的中位數，揭示轉錄體擾動廣度相對於實驗深度的分布。
zh.data_explanation: 該圖表展示實驗樣本量（檢測細胞數）與CD4+ T細胞靶標擾動的轉錄體範疇（DE gene數量）之間的相關性。聚集在中位數DE閾值附近的靶標揭示哪些候選靶標能夠達成聚焦、可重複的轉錄體效應—這是選擇具有可解釋性和可靶向機制的靶標的關鍵標準，對CD4+ 生物學的研究至關重要。

en.title: Pairwise structure of DE metrics: effect size decouples from response breadth
en.description: A 4×4 matrix visualization of four differential expression (DE) metrics: Cells log10, On-target effect, DE genes log10, and Genes up log10. The diagonal contains histograms showing the marginal distribution of each metric, while off-diagonal panels display hexbin density plots (viridis colormap) revealing pairwise relationships between metrics.
en.data_explanation: This correlation matrix quantifies how on-target effect size decouples from the breadth of transcriptional response across candidate CD4+ T-cell targets. The hexbin density encoding highlights which metric combinations are prevalent in the screen, clarifying whether strong on-target effects correlate with widespread DE gene induction—a key distinction for prioritizing targets with focused versus pleiotropic activity profiles.

zh.data_explanation: 此相關矩陣量化了目標 CD4+ T 細胞候選物間轉錄反應廣度與靶向效應大小如何解耦。hexbin 密度編碼突出了螢光屏中哪些指標組合盛行，澄清強靶向效應是否與廣泛 DE 基因誘導相關—這是區分具有集中型與多效應活性譜系的靶點優先級的關鍵區別。

en.title: Shortlist genes group by their three-condition knockdown profile
en.description: Dendrogram displaying hierarchical clustering of 15 genes (SENP5, CCNC, DENR, TADA2B, SUPT20H, MED12, UBXN1, TADA1, VAV1, SGF29, CD247, PMVK, CD3E, LAT, PLCG1) based on their knockdown effects across three experimental conditions. The y-axis represents cluster distance computed using Ward linkage on effect-size profiles.
en.data_explanation: Genes are grouped by similarity in how their knockdown impacts CD4+ T-cell phenotype or function across three distinct conditions, revealing functionally related targets that may act in parallel or coordinated pathways. This clustering identifies candidate genes with correlated roles in CD4+ T-cell biology, enabling prioritization of therapeutic targets with shared mechanistic features.

zh.data_explanation: 基因根據其敲除對CD4+ T細胞表型或功能在三個不同條件下的影響相似度進行分組，揭示可能在平行或協調途徑中發揮作用的功能相關靶點。此聚類識別出在CD4+ T細胞生物學中具有相關角色的候選基因，使具有共同機制特徵的治療靶點優先化成為可能。

en.title: Three-Set Euler Diagram: Significant Genes, Gating Filter, and Off-Target Genes
en.description: Three-set Euler diagram showing overlap among 7,913 significant genes, 1,235 genes passing a quality gate, and 1,152 off-target genes. The passes-gate set is entirely nested within significant; the off-target set partially overlaps significant (1,059 genes shared) and independently contains 93 genes outside the significant set.
en.data_explanation: This diagram stratifies candidate CD4+ T-cell targets by statistical significance, technical quality (gating), and predicted off-target binding. The 5,681 significant-only genes represent high-confidence targets free of gating or off-target concerns; the 1,173 genes passing both significance and gating thresholds form a refined high-priority list; and the 1,059 off-target-significant overlap identifies genes requiring binding-specificity validation before advancement, while 93 off-target genes flagged outside significance may indicate systematic assay artifacts or sequence homology issues.

zh.title: 三集合歐拉圖：顯著基因、閘門篩選與非靶標基因
zh.description: 三集合歐拉圖展示 7,913 個顯著基因、1,235 個通過品質閘門的基因，以及 1,152 個非靶標基因之間的重疊關係。通過閘門的集合完全巢套於顯著基因集合內；非靶標集合與顯著基因集合部分重疊（共 1,059 個基因），並獨立包含 93 個位於顯著基因集合外的基因。
zh.data_explanation: 本圖表根據統計顯著性、技術品質（gating）和預測非靶標結合情況，將候選 CD4+ T 細胞靶標進行分層。5,681 個僅在顯著基因中的基因代表高信度靶標，不存在閘門或非靶標顧慮；1,173 個同時通過顯著性和 gating 閾值的基因構成精煉的高優先級列表；1,059 個非靶標與顯著基因的重疊區域識別出在推進前需進行結合特異性驗證的基因，而 93 個標記在顯著基因集合外的非靶標基因可能表明系統性檢測偽影或序列同源性問題。

en.title: Downstream DE Gene Count by Target Gene and Stimulation Condition
en.description: Manhattan-style scatter plot with target genes on the X-axis (alphabetical order) and log-scaled downstream DE gene count on the Y-axis. Points are colored by three stimulation conditions: Rest (blue), Stim8hr (orange), and Stim48hr (purple). Fifteen shortlist genes with DE count >1000 are circled and labeled.
en.data_explanation: The plot quantifies the transcriptional impact of perturbing each target gene under different T-cell stimulation states. Genes with high downstream DE counts (circled shortlist) are strong candidates for CD4+ T-cell therapeutic intervention, as they regulate large numbers of differentially expressed genes and show condition-dependent effects critical for understanding immune response mechanisms.

zh.title: 按目標基因和刺激條件統計的下游差異表達基因數量
zh.description: 曼哈頓式散點圖，X軸為目標基因（按字母順序），Y軸為對數尺度的下游DE基因計數。點按三種刺激條件著色：Rest（藍色）、Stim8hr（橙色）和Stim48hr（紫色）。十五個DE計數>1000的shortlist基因用圓圈標記並標註。
zh.data_explanation: 該圖量化了在不同T細胞刺激狀態下擾動每個目標基因的轉錄影響。具有高下游DE基因計數的基因（圓圈標記的shortlist）是CD4+ T細胞治療干預的強有力候選，因為它們調控大量差異表達基因，並表現出對理解免疫反應機制至關重要的條件依賴性效應。

en.title: CD4+ T-cell knockdown effect trajectories across stimulation time course
en.description: Parallel-coordinates plot tracking on-target effect size (negative values indicate stronger knockdown) for 15 genes across three conditions: Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr. Two trajectory classes are shown: 12 genes where knockdown effect weakens toward zero with stimulation (blue), and 3 genes where effect strengthens (red).
en.data_explanation: Each gene's on-target effect size represents the magnitude of phenotypic change upon targeted knockdown in CD4+ T cells. The convergence of most effects toward zero by 48hr stimulation indicates that target activity diminishes or becomes redundant as cells transition from resting to activated state, a critical observation for identifying targets whose perturbation impacts early versus sustained T-cell function in CD4+ target discovery.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞敲除效應軌跡跨刺激時間過程
zh.description: 平行座標圖追蹤15個基因在三種條件下的靶向效應大小（負值表示更強的敲除）：Rest、Stim8hr和Stim48hr。顯示兩個軌跡類別：12個基因的敲除效應隨著刺激而減弱至零（藍色），以及3個基因的效應增強（紅色）。
zh.data_explanation: 每個基因的靶向效應大小代表CD4+ T細胞中靶向敲除引起的表型變化幅度。大多數效應在48小時刺激時收斂至零，表明目標活性在細胞從靜息態過渡到活化態時減少或變成冗餘，這是識別其擾動影響CD4+靶標發現中早期與持續性T細胞功能的目標的關鍵觀察。

zh.data_explanation: 每個帶狀區域代表按轉錄變化幅度（DE基因數量）分組的靶點，揭示靶點選擇壓力如何隨著差異表達規模變化。具有較高DE基因計數（200–999和≥1000）的靶點表示具有廣泛或強烈反應特徵的基因，對於優先選擇CD4+ T細胞靶點至關重要，這些靶點在靜息和刺激狀態下具有穩健且可重現的調控程序（n=9,399 Rest；n=9,672 Stim8hr；n=9,686 Stim48hr）。

en.title: Distribution of knockdown response magnitudes across REST, 8-hour, and 48-hour stimulation conditions
en.description: 100%-stacked bar chart showing three experimental conditions (Rest, Stim 8 hr, Stim 48 hr) on the x-axis and the share of tested knockdowns (%) on the y-axis. en.data_explanation: The chart quantifies how knockdown magnitude varies across resting and stimulated CD4+ T-cell states, with each segment reflecting the fraction of tested perturbations that trigger increasingly large transcriptional cascades. Response-size stratification is essential for target discovery because it identifies which CD4+ regulators produce focal versus broad downstream effects, helping prioritize candidates that drive coordinated immune programs over those with isolated side effects.

raw_source: Computed from target_master_table.csv (ctx_specific_de column, ranked descending); positive/negative labels from curated controls: 13 canonical CD4+ T-cell regulators (positives), 1 housekeeping negative, 1,211 other targets as background.

en.title: CD4+ Perturb-seq Context-Specific DE Benchmark: PR Curve, ROC Curve, and Regulator Ranking
en.description: Three-panel figure evaluating context-specific differential expression in CD4+ T cells. Panel (a) shows a Precision-Recall curve with AP=0.47 (45× random baseline of 0.011). Panel (b) displays an ROC curve with AUROC=0.85 for positive versus rest classification. Panel (c) is a strip plot showing the distribution of context-specific rank (1=top) across three regulator categories: canonical regulators (n=13), housekeeping (n=1), and other (n=1211), with median ranks of 36 vs 964 and Mann-Whitney p=8.8e-06.
en.data_explanation: This benchmark evaluates the ability of Perturb-seq to identify regulators whose knockdown produces context-specific transcriptional effects in CD4+ T cells. The PR and ROC curves quantify detection sensitivity and specificity, while the rank-distribution panel demonstrates that canonical regulators are significantly enriched at high ranks (low values, top-ranked), validating that the method recovers known functional regulators. The stark separation between canonical regulators and the large 'other' category (p=8.8e-06) indicates strong discriminatory power for target discovery in this immune context.

zh.title: CD4+ Perturb-seq 脈絡特異性差異表達基準：PR 曲線、ROC 曲線及調控因子排名
zh.description: 三面板圖評估 CD4+ T 細胞中脈絡特異性差異表達。面板 (a) 顯示精準度-召回率曲線，AP=0.47（隨機基準線的 45 倍，0.011）。面板 (b) 展示 ROC 曲線，正類別對其餘類別的 AUROC=0.85。面板 (c) 為條狀圖，展示脈絡特異性排名（1=最高）在三個調控因子類別中的分佈：典型調控因子（n=13）、管家基因（n=1）及其他（n=1211），中位數排名分別為 36 與 964，Mann-Whitney p=8.8e-06。
zh.data_explanation: 此基準評估 Perturb-seq 識別其敲除會在 CD4+ T 細胞中產生脈絡特異性轉錄效應的調控因子的能力。PR 與 ROC 曲線量化偵測靈敏度與特異性，而排名分佈面板顯示典型調控因子在高排名（低數值、最高排名）處顯著富集，驗證該方法可恢復已知的功能性調控因子。典型調控因子與龐大「其他」類別間的明顯分離（p=8.8e-06）表明在此免疫脈絡中目標發現具有強大的區分能力。

raw_source: Computed from DE_stats.suppl_table.csv (per-target, per-condition differential expression statistics and n_cells_target counts) and target_master_table.csv (LOEUF and pLI constraint annotations). Aggregated per target across all conditions; cell count gate = 200; constraint thresholds: LOEUF < 0.35 OR pLI ≥ 0.9.

en.title: Loss-intolerant genes drop out below the cell-count gate
en.description: A scatter plot with max cells recovered (log scale) on the x-axis and LOEUF (gnomAD) on the y-axis. A vertical dashed line marks the 200-cell gate threshold, a horizontal dotted line marks LOEUF 0.35, and a shaded region indicates the essential-suspect dropout zone (cells <200, LOEUF <0.35). Red points (n=237) represent likely essential dropouts; grey points represent other targets. Six genes are labeled: HCFC1, PRKDC, KMT2A, USP7, MED13L, ARID1A.
en.data_explanation: LOEUF (loss-of-function observed/expected upper bound fraction) quantifies intolerance to loss-of-function mutations in the general population; lower values indicate genes under strong constraint and likely essential. Genes falling into the shaded dropout zone—those recovered in fewer than 200 cells across conditions and with LOEUF <0.35—are flagged as likely essential targets missed by the screen, making this plot critical for identifying high-confidence CD4+ T-cell essential genes obscured by insufficient sampling depth.

zh.title: 喪失耐受基因在細胞數量閾值下消失
zh.description: 散點圖，x軸為回收的最大細胞數（對數尺度），y軸為 LOEUF (gnomAD)。垂直虛線標記 200 細胞閾值，水平點線標記 LOEUF 0.35，陰影區域表示必需基因嫌疑人消失區（細胞 <200、LOEUF <0.35）。紅色點（n=237）代表可能的必需基因消失；灰色點代表其他靶點。標記了六個基因：HCFC1、PRKDC、KMT2A、USP7、MED13L、ARID1A。
zh.data_explanation: LOEUF（功能喪失觀察值/預期值上限分數）量化群體中對功能喪失突變的耐受程度；較低的值表示基因受到強約束且可能是必需的。落入陰影消失區的基因——在所有條件下回收少於 200 個細胞且 LOEUF <0.35 的基因——被標記為篩選中遺漏的可能必需靶點，使該圖對於識別因取樣深度不足而被掩蓋的高置信度 CD4+ T 細胞必需基因至關重要。

raw_source: vdaeb84c7_target_master_table.csv — a master table of CD4+ T-cell perturbation targets annotated with context-specificity, delivery modality, polarity, and differential expression metrics.

en.title: Immune drug-delivery decision layer: turning 'important' into 'which drug can we make today'
en.description: A two-panel figure showing the filtering funnel from genome-wide CD4+ T-cell targets to deliverable candidates (left), and the final 39 deliverable targets stratified by drug modality and polarity (right). The left panel is a horizontal bar chart with logarithmic scaling; the right is a horizontal bar chart ordered by modality group, with colour encoding polarity (repressor/activator/mixed) and y-axis labels showing gene names.
en.data_explanation: The left panel traces the selection pipeline: 11,526 genome-wide genes are filtered to 1,235 passing quality gates, then 96 identified as context-specific (stimulation vs. rest in CD4+ T cells), and finally 39 with known drug-delivery modalities. The right panel shows these 39 deliverable targets ranked by context-specific differential expression (log scale) within three drug modality classes (CAR-T/ADC/antibody, antibody, small molecule), with colour indicating whether knockdown activates or represses immune function. This visualization bridges target discovery and drug developability: it shows which high-confidence, immune-relevant genes can be acted on with existing therapeutic technologies.

zh.title: 免疫藥物遞送決策層：將「重要」轉化為「今天我們能製造哪種藥物」
zh.description: 一個雙面板圖表，展示從全基因組 CD4+ T 細胞靶點到可交付候選物的篩選漏斗（左），以及最終 39 個可交付靶點按藥物模式和極性分層（右）。左面板是具對數刻度的水平長條圖；右面板按模式組排序的水平長條圖，色彩編碼極性（抑制劑/激活劑/混合），y 軸標籤顯示基因名稱。
zh.data_explanation: 左面板追蹤選擇管線：11,526 個全基因組基因篩選至 1,235 個通過品質門檻，隨後 96 個被識別為背景特異性（CD4+ T 細胞中的刺激 vs. 靜息），最終 39 個具有已知藥物遞送模式。右面板展示這 39 個可交付靶點在三個藥物模式類別（CAR-T/ADC/抗體、抗體、小分子）內，按背景特異性差異表達（log 刻度）排序，色彩指示敲除是否激活或抑制免疫功能。此視覺化連接靶點發現與藥物可開發性：它展示哪些高置信度、免疫相關基因可使用現有治療技術進行作用。

raw_source: vdaeb84c7_target_master_table.csv (columns: kinetic_archetype, de_Rest, de_Stim8hr, de_Stim48hr, n_avoid_flags, avoid_flags, gene)

en.title: Kinetic archetypes and clinical avoid-list for CD4+ T-cell targets
en.description: Two-panel figure showing kinetic response patterns and safety flags for gene targets. Left: line plot of normalized differential-expression breadth across Rest, Stim 8hr, and Stim 48hr timepoints, stratified by kinetic archetype (early transient, late sustained, stim switch, other). Right: horizontal stacked bar chart ranking 15 high-risk genes by number of clinical avoid flags (pleiotropy, constraint, dosage sensitivity).
en.data_explanation: The left panel identifies when putative targets exert their function during T-cell activation, enabling kinetic stratification for mechanism-of-action studies. The right panel flags genes with high pleiotropy (broad expression effects), genetic constraint (haploinsufficient), or dosage sensitivity (loss-of-function intolerance), which predict on-target toxicity and clinical safety liabilities in perturbation-based target discovery.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞靶點的動力學原型與臨床避免清單
zh.description: 雙面板圖表展示基因靶點的動力學反應模式與安全性標誌。左圖：跨越Rest、Stim 8hr及Stim 48hr時間點的標準化差異表達廣度折線圖，按動力學原型分層（early transient、late sustained、stim switch、other）。右圖：水平堆疊長條圖排列15個高風險基因，依臨床避免標誌數量排序（pleiotropy、constraint、dosage sensitivity）。
zh.data_explanation: 左面板識別推定靶點在T細胞活化期間發揮功能的時間，能夠進行動力學分層以利於機制研究。右面板標誌具有高pleiotropy（廣泛表達效應）、遺傳constraint（haploinsufficient）或dosage sensitivity（loss-of-function不耐受）的基因，這些特性預測了靶點毒性及擾動型靶點發現中的臨床安全風險。

raw_source: Computed from DE_stats supplementary table (v11c6348b_DE_stats.suppl_table.csv), which contains per-target-contrast statistics: ontarget_significant flag, offtarget_flag, n_cells_target cell count, n_total_de_genes DE count, and target_contrast_gene_name identifier. Per-target rank score is the maximum n_total_de_genes across all experimental conditions for each target; passing set is defined by boolean AND of thresholds applied row-wise, then aggregated by target identity.

en.title: Threshold Sensitivity Analysis for CD4+ T-cell Perturbation Target Discovery
en.description: Three-panel figure quantifying robustness of target selection across parameter thresholds. Panel (a) is a heatmap showing absolute count of targets (n=600–1700) across minimum DE genes D ∈ {30,40,50,75,100} (rows) and minimum cells per target C ∈ {100,150,200,250,300,400} (columns), with a red box highlighting the selected threshold pair C=200, D=50 (n=1235 targets). Panel (b) is a histogram plotting target stability across the full universe (11,526 targets) on log-scaled y-axis versus pass_fraction, with regions annotated FRAGILE, BOUNDARY, and CORE. Panel (c) is a bar chart showing Spearman rank correlation (rho) between rank scores and baseline ordering, demonstrating threshold invariance at rho=1.00.
en.data_explanation: The heatmap quantifies how stringency thresholds for differential expression (minimum genes) and target detection (minimum cells) affect the size of the target shortlist, revealing trade-offs between statistical power and discovery scope. The stability histogram identifies which targets persist robustly across the full parameter landscape versus those at risk of inclusion/exclusion at boundary conditions, critical for prioritizing high-confidence CD4+ T-cell modulators. The rank-score invariance (rho=1.00) confirms that target prioritization order remains stable despite threshold variation, justifying the selection of the C=200/D=50 operating point for downstream functional validation.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞擾動靶點發現的閾值敏感性分析
zh.description: 三面板圖表量化跨參數閾值的靶點選擇魯棒性。面板(a)為heatmap，顯示最小DE基因D∈{30,40,50,75,100}（行）和每個靶點最小細胞數C∈{100,150,200,250,300,400}（列）across的靶點絕對計數（n=600–1700），紅色方框突出選定的閾值對C=200, D=50（n=1235靶點）。面板(b)為histogram，在log尺度y軸上繪製跨完整宇宙（11,526靶點）的靶點穩定性versus pass_fraction，並標註FRAGILE、BOUNDARY和CORE區域。面板(c)為bar chart，顯示Spearman rank correlation（rho）在rank scores與baseline ordering之間，證明rho=1.00的閾值不變性。
zh.data_explanation: Heatmap量化差異表達（最小基因）和靶點檢測（最小細胞）的stringency閾值如何影響靶點候選清單的大小，揭示統計檢定力與發現範圍之間的權衡。穩定性histogram識別哪些靶點跨完整參數景觀穩健持存，與邊界條件下納入/排除風險的靶點對比，對於優先考慮高置信度CD4+ T細胞調節劑至關重要。Rank score不變性（rho=1.00）確認儘管閾值變化，靶點優先順序仍然穩定，證明C=200/D=50操作點選擇對於下游功能驗證的合理性。

raw_source: Computed from four CSV artifacts: vb5899e1f_benchmark_results.csv (baseline performance metrics), va76505a5_dropout_diagnosis.csv (cross-validation robustness), v26f49368_context_specific_corrected.csv (corrected phenotype predictions), and v6d81fd84_delivery_modality_all_1235.csv (target modality classification with n=1235 targets).

en.title: How we know a CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq target is real
en.description: Four-panel figure showing target validation workflow. Panel (a) displays a single ROC curve comparing performance against all other genes (AUROC 0.846) and versus one curated negative control (AUROC 0.923) with n=13 positives. Panels (b)–(d) are scatter and funnel plots: (b) LOEUF vs cells-recovered percentile identifying 237 constraint artifacts (94% with LOEUF<0.35); (c) peak stimulated DE signal vs resting baseMean flagging 11 expression artifacts (baseMean<10) among 84 true regulators; (d) discovery funnel narrowing 1,235 candidates through 96 context-specific, 84 baseline-confirmed, to 34 deliverable targets.
en.data_explanation: Perturb-seq screening identifies candidate CD4+ T-cell regulators but requires multi-stage filtering to distinguish true regulatory hits from technical artifacts. Constraint analysis (LOEUF) and baseline expression correction remove false positives arising from measurement noise and dropout bias, while the discovery funnel tracks survival through biological validation. These integrated filters ensure only high-confidence, experimentally robust targets advance to functional testing and therapeutic development.

zh.title: 我們如何確認 CD4+ T-細胞 Perturb-seq 標靶是真實的
zh.description: 四面板圖表展示標靶驗證工作流程。面板 (a) 顯示單一 ROC 曲線，比較相對於所有其他基因的性能（AUROC 0.846）和相對於一個精選陰性對照的性能（AUROC 0.923），n=13 個陽性樣本。面板 (b)–(d) 為散點圖和漏斗圖：(b) LOEUF vs cells-recovered 百分位數，識別 237 個約束製品（94% 的 LOEUF<0.35）；(c) peak stimulated DE signal vs resting baseMean，在 84 個真實調控因子中標記 11 個表達製品（baseMean<10）；(d) 發現漏斗將 1,235 個候選物縮小至 96 個背景特異性、84 個基線確認、34 個可交付標靶。
zh.data_explanation: Perturb-seq 篩選可識別候選 CD4+ T-細胞調控因子，但需要多階段篩選以區分真實調控命中和技術製品。約束分析（LOEUF）和基線表達校正移除源自測量雜訊和 dropout 偏差的假陽性，而發現漏斗追蹤生物驗證的存活情況。這些整合的篩選器確保只有高信心、實驗上穩健的標靶才能進行功能測試和治療開發。

raw_source: Computed panels assembled from level-4 processed Perturb-seq data (knockdown effect sizes, phenotype correlations, or pathway annotations) combined via the grid composition system; individual panel images stored as files referenced in panel_paths and composited into level4_external_validation_figure.png at 300 dpi.

en.title: CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq external validation results
en.description: Multi-panel figure displaying external validation of Perturbase target-discovery findings in CD4+ T cells. The figure uses a grid-based composition layout with customizable panel arrangement, open-frame plotting style (sans-serif font, left/bottom spines only), and figure-level panels labeled with letters (lowercase by default). Chart types and specific encodings depend on individual panel data but follow consistent styling (8pt base font, 0.6pt axes, 1.2pt lines).
en.data_explanation: This figure validates computational target predictions from the Perturb-seq platform by comparing results against external datasets or independent experimental evidence in CD4+ T cells. The multi-panel design allows systematic presentation of validation metrics (e.g., replication of knockdown phenotypes, pathway enrichment, or cross-dataset correlation), demonstrating the reliability and generalizability of Perturbase predictions for target discovery in T-cell biology.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞 Perturb-seq 外部驗證結果
zh.description: 多面板圖表展示 Perturbase 標靶發現研究在 CD4+ T 細胞中的外部驗證。該圖表採用網格式組成佈局與可自訂面板排列、開放邊框繪製風格（無襯線字體、僅左/下邊框），並以字母標籤標註圖表級面板（預設為小寫）。圖表類型與具體編碼因各面板資料而異，但遵循一致的風格設定（8pt 基礎字體、0.6pt 坐標軸、1.2pt 線條）。
zh.data_explanation: 本圖表透過對比外部資料集或 CD4+ T 細胞中的獨立實驗證據，驗證 Perturb-seq 平台的計算標靶預測。多面板設計允許系統化呈現驗證指標（例如敲除酚型的重現、通路富集或跨資料集相關性），展示 Perturbase 預測在 T 細胞生物學標靶發現中的可靠性與通用性。

raw_source: Computed from signed_phase1.json (per-flagship downstream gene counts), signed_ranking_v2.csv (1,235 shortlisted targets with directionality_index and in_gate_shortlist status), and lincs_concordance.csv (sign-agreement fractions for four reference datasets)

en.title: Phenotype-signed ranking and pathway validation of CD4+ T-cell perturbation targets
en.description: Three-panel figure showing target prioritization and validation. Panel a: S-curve ranking of 1,235 shortlist targets by phenotype signature score (n_up−n_down)/(n_up+n_down), with points colored blue (negative) or red (positive) and five flagship genes (CD3E, PLCG1, VAV1, STAT3, BCL10) labeled. Panel b: Reactome pathway-enrichment bubble plot with immune and signaling pathways as rows, five flagship genes as columns, bubble color indicating direction (red=upregulated, blue=downregulated) and size representing gene overlap. Panel c: Bar chart of sign-agreement fraction for four target genes (SENP5, PLCG1, CCNC, PMVK) tested against non-T-cell LINCS perturbation lines, with 0.5 dashed line marking chance agreement.
en.data_explanation: The ranking prioritizes targets whose perturbation produces CD4+ T-cell phenotype signatures consistent with T-cell activation and function, using a balanced up/down scoring metric. Pathway enrichment and cross-cell-type validation confirm that top candidates (CD3E, PLCG1, VAV1, STAT3, BCL10) converge on immune signaling networks and exhibit robust, lineage-specific effects—critical for selecting targets likely to enhance T-cell responses in therapeutic contexts.

zh.title: 表型簽名排名與 CD4+ T 細胞擾動靶點的通路驗證
zh.description: 三面板圖表展示靶點優先序列與驗證。面板 a：1,235 個候選靶點按表型簽名評分 (n_up−n_down)/(n_up+n_down) 的 S 曲線排名，點以藍色（負值）或紅色（正值）著色，五個旗艦基因（CD3E、PLCG1、VAV1、STAT3、BCL10）標註。面板 b：Reactome 通路富集氣泡圖，免疫與信號傳導通路為列，五個旗艦基因為欄，氣泡顏色表示方向（紅色=上調、藍色=下調），大小代表基因重疊。面板 c：四個靶點基因（SENP5、PLCG1、CCNC、PMVK）對非 T 細胞 LINCS 擾動細胞株的符號一致性分數長條圖，0.5 虛線標示隨機一致性。
zh.data_explanation: 該排名優先選擇擾動產生與 T 細胞活化和功能相符的 CD4+ T 細胞表型簽名的靶點，使用平衡的上調/下調評分指標。通路富集與跨細胞類型驗證確認頂級候選物（CD3E、PLCG1、VAV1、STAT3、BCL10）聚焦於免疫信號傳導網絡，並展現穩健的譜系特異性效應——對於選擇可能增強治療背景下 T 細胞反應的靶點至關重要。

raw_source: Two parquet files (full Perturb-seq knockdown profiles: vca1ccabf_part-000.parquet and v3df56bd0_part-001.parquet) merged with LINCS reference signatures (vdb18632b_lincs_demo_signatures_4genes.csv containing landmark gene responses for 4 overlapping targets); Spearman correlations computed between log fold-change vectors per target.

en.title: GB10 Signed Matrix vs LINCS - Directional Agreement and Rank Correlation (4 Targets, Non-T-Cell Lines)
en.description: A two-panel bar chart comparing GB10 perturbation data against LINCS signatures for four targets (SENP5, PLCG1, CCNC, PMVK). Panel (a) shows directional agreement as the fraction of sign-concordant gene responses (with n values: SENP5 n=573, PLCG1 n=499, CCNC n=526, PMVK n=360) against a 0.5 chance baseline. Panel (b) displays Spearman rank correlation coefficients within the overlapping subspace for each target, with PMVK highlighted in red (rho=+0.22*) showing the strongest correlation.
en.data_explanation: These metrics assess whether genome-scale perturbations measured in non-T-cell lines (GB10 matrix) show reproducible directional and rank-order concordance with published LINCS signatures. PMVK exhibits notably higher correlation (rho=+0.22) relative to other targets, suggesting more consistent functional patterns; the directional agreement fractions near or below 0.5 across most targets indicate limited sign-level reproducibility, a key signal for evaluating target reliability in cross-platform CD4+ T-cell discovery workflows.

zh.title: GB10 簽名矩陣 vs LINCS - 方向性一致性與等級相關性（4 個標靶，非 T 細胞株）
zh.description: 雙面板長條圖比較 GB10 擾動數據與四個標靶（SENP5、PLCG1、CCNC、PMVK）的 LINCS 簽名。面板 (a) 展示方向性一致性為符號一致基因反應的比例（樣本數：SENP5 n=573、PLCG1 n=499、CCNC n=526、PMVK n=360），與 0.5 隨機基線相比。面板 (b) 顯示各標靶在重疊子空間內的 Spearman 等級相關係數，PMVK 以紅色突出標示（rho=+0.22*），呈現最強相關性。
zh.data_explanation: 這些指標評估在非 T 細胞株（GB10 矩陣）中測量的全基因組擾動是否與已發表的 LINCS 簽名呈現可重複的方向性與等級順序一致性。PMVK 相對於其他標靶表現出明顯更高的相關性（rho=+0.22），暗示更一致的功能模式；大多數標靶的方向性一致性比例接近或低於 0.5，表明符號等級的可重現性有限，這是在 CD4+ T 細胞發現跨平台工作流中評估標靶可靠性的關鍵訊號。

raw_source: vdaeb84c7_target_master_table.csv (artifact ID: 46a1c017-4a49-46dc-8098-512c17286263); contains columns: loeuf, pli, delivery_modality, avoid_tier; n=1,235 targets

en.title: Evidence Coverage Improvement: gnomAD Integration for CD4+ T-cell Targets
en.description: Side-by-side bar charts comparing target coverage before and after bulk gnomAD data integration. Left panel shows percentage coverage across five evidence types (gnomAD LOEUF, gnomAD pLI, delivery modality, polarity, kinetics); right panel shows absolute target counts stratified by safety tier (clear, caution, high_risk, avoid) based on cumulative risk flags.
en.data_explanation: The dataset comprises 1,235 CD4+ T-cell target candidates. Integration of bulk-downloaded gnomAD variants increased coverage from 6% to 97% for essential gene constraint scores, avoiding the computational bottleneck of per-gene API crawls. This expanded evidence base revealed previously undetected safety liabilities: high-risk and avoid-tier targets increased from 27 to 387, enabling more rigorous target prioritization for the Perturbase platform.

zh.title: 證據覆蓋改善：gnomAD 整合用於 CD4+ T 細胞靶點
zh.description: 並排條形圖比較整合大量 gnomAD 數據前後的靶點覆蓋情況。左側面板顯示五種證據類型（gnomAD LOEUF、gnomAD pLI、delivery modality、polarity、kinetics）的百分比覆蓋；右側面板顯示基於累積風險標誌按安全等級（clear、caution、high_risk、avoid）分層的絕對靶點數。
zh.data_explanation: 數據集包含 1,235 個 CD4+ T 細胞靶點候選物。整合大量下載的 gnomAD 變異體將基本基因約束評分的覆蓋範圍從 6% 提高到 97%，避免了逐基因 API 爬取的計算瓶頸。此擴展證據庫揭示了先前未檢測到的安全風險：高風險和 avoid 等級靶點從 27 增加到 387，為 Perturbase 平台的更嚴格靶點優先級排序提供了支持。

raw_source: Hardcoded matrix within the producing code: six (label, developer_score, user_score, remedy) tuples representing Perturbase platform assessment at a specific development checkpoint.

en.title: The Developer–User Gap: Six Blindspots in Perturbase
en.description: Dumbbell plot with six horizontal rows, each representing a blindspot in Perturbase. Blue dots mark developer perspective ('is it built?'), red dots mark user perspective ('can I get my job done?'), and gray lines connect them to show the gap. Remedy annotations appear on the right side of each row.
en.data_explanation: The gaps (ranging 4–7 points) quantify misalignment between developer implementation and user capability across six critical areas: Gene absence (7-point gap), Known vs novel targets (5-point gap), Clinical positioning (4-point gap), Single-dataset limitation (6-point gap), Action loop closure (4-point gap), and Jargon accessibility (6-point gap). These disparities highlight where Perturbase fails to bridge developer features with end-user requirements for effective CD4+ T-cell target discovery workflows.

zh.title: 開發者–使用者落差：Perturbase 中的六個盲點
zh.description: 啞鈴圖包含六個水平列，各代表 Perturbase 中的一個盲點。藍色點標記開發者觀點（「是否已建置？」），紅色點標記使用者觀點（「我能完成工作嗎？」），灰色線連接兩者以顯示落差。每列右側附有補救註解。
zh.data_explanation: 落差（範圍 4–7 分）量化了開發者實作與使用者能力在六個關鍵領域的不對齊情況：Gene absence（7 分落差）、Known vs novel targets（5 分落差）、Clinical positioning（4 分落差）、Single-dataset limitation（6 分落差）、Action loop closure（4 分落差）和 Jargon accessibility（6 分落差）。這些差異突顯了 Perturbase 在將開發者功能與終端使用者對有效 CD4+ T-cell 標靶發現工作流的需求相結合時的不足之處。

raw_source: vdaeb84c7_target_master_table.csv (CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq data filtered to context-specific perturbations; columns: gene, ctx_specific_de, n_avoid_flags, is_ctx_specific)

en.title: One Dataset, Two Opposing First Impressions
en.description: A scatter plot showing CD4+ T-cell perturbation targets plotted along two dimensions: researcher's lens (context-specific effect breadth on T-cell activation, log scale, x-axis) versus clinician's lens (number of risk flags including pleiotropy, genetic constraint, and dosage sensitivity, y-axis). Points are colored by clinical risk tier (clear, caution, high risk, avoid), with five selected genes (CD3E, PLCG1, VAV1, STAT3, BCL10) highlighted and labeled with arrows. A shaded conflict zone in the upper right emphasizes the trade-off between scientific appeal and clinical safety.
en.data_explanation: The figure illustrates the fundamental tension in target discovery: genes with the broadest context-specific effects on T-cell activation—the most scientifically interesting—often accumulate multiple risk flags (pleiotropy, genetic constraint, dosage sensitivity) that concern clinicians. This dual-perspective view reveals why the most mechanistically novel targets are often the most dangerous for therapeutic development, making explicit the competing priorities between hypothesis-driven research and clinical safety assessment.

zh.title: 一個數據集，兩種對立的第一印象
zh.description: 散點圖顯示 CD4+ T 細胞擾動靶點，繪製在兩個維度上：研究者視角（T 細胞激活的背景特異性效應廣度，對數刻度，x 軸）與臨床醫生視角（風險標誌數量，包括多效性、遺傳約束和劑量敏感性，y 軸）。點按臨床風險等級著色（清晰、謹慎、高風險、避免），五個選定基因（CD3E、PLCG1、VAV1、STAT3、BCL10）用箭頭突出顯示和標記。右上方的陰影衝突區強調了科學吸引力與臨床安全性之間的權衡。
zh.data_explanation: 該圖表說明了靶點發現中的根本矛盾：對 T 細胞激活具有最廣泛背景特異性效應的基因——科學上最有趣的基因——經常積累多個風險標誌（多效性、遺傳約束、劑量敏感性），這些令臨床醫生擔憂。這種雙視角視圖揭示了為什麼機制上最新穎的靶點往往對治療開發最危險，明確表示了假說驅動研究與臨床安全評估之間的競爭優先級。

raw_source: DE_stats.suppl_table.csv (differential expression statistics table filtered by QC criteria: n_cells_target ≥ 200, ontarget_significant = true, offtarget_flag = false, n_total_de_genes ≥ 50)

en.title: Top CD4+ T-cell Perturbation Targets by DE Gene Count
en.description: Horizontal lollipop plot ranking the top 12 perturbation targets by downstream differentially expressed gene count. Blue points indicate immune-candidate targets (CD3E, LAT, PLCG1, VAV1, CD247); red points indicate broad-effect targets (TADA2B, SENP5, SGF29, UBXN1, MED12, CCNC, SUPT20H). The x-axis shows DE gene count ranging from approximately 3900 to 5700.
en.data_explanation: Each target represents a gene whose perturbation in CD4+ T cells produces a characteristic downstream transcriptional signature; the DE gene count quantifies the breadth of that signature. Immune-candidate targets (blue) show more focused, pathway-specific effects, while broad-effect targets (red) alter expression of thousands of genes, making them less suitable for selective CD4+ T-cell modulation in therapeutic contexts.

zh.title: CD4+ T細胞擾動靶點按DE基因數排名前12
zh.description: 水平棒棒糖圖展示按下游差異表達基因數排名的前12個擾動靶點。藍色點表示免疫候選靶點（CD3E、LAT、PLCG1、VAV1、CD247）；紅色點表示廣泛效應靶點（TADA2B、SENP5、SGF29、UBXN1、MED12、CCNC、SUPT20H）。x軸顯示DE基因數，範圍約3900至5700。
zh.data_explanation: 每個靶點代表一個基因，其在CD4+ T細胞中的擾動產生特徵性的下游轉錄簽名；DE基因數量化該簽名的廣泛度。免疫候選靶點（藍色）表現出更集中、通路特異性的效應，而廣泛效應靶點（紅色）改變數千個基因的表達，使其在治療背景下不適合進行選擇性CD4+ T細胞調控。

raw_source: Perturbase CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq platform; baseline-corrected DE analysis, resting-baseMean floor = 8.3 (all-conditions Q25) for artifact classification

en.title: Context-Specific Regulators: Baseline Correction Diagnostic
en.description: Scatter plot comparing stimulated differential expression (DE) signal on the y-axis against resting baseline expression (baseMean) on the x-axis. Points are color-coded to distinguish 84 true context-specific regulators (higher baseline expression) from 11 expression artifacts with near-zero resting signal (baseMean floor = 8.3 (all-conditions Q25)), enabling visual separation of genuine regulatory effects from technical noise.
en.data_explanation: This diagnostic plot filters genuine CD4+ T-cell regulators from spurious signals by leveraging baseline expression as a quality filter. True context-specific regulators show substantial resting expression and respond robustly to stimulation, while artifacts cluster near zero baseline and produce inflated fold-changes from negligible starting values. This separation is critical for accurate functional annotation in Perturb-seq screens, ensuring downstream regulatory predictions reflect biologically relevant perturbation effects rather than measurement noise.

zh.title: 特異性調控因子：基線校正診斷
zh.description: 散點圖比較刺激後差異表達 (DE) 信號（y軸）與靜息基線表達 (baseMean)（x軸）。點以顏色編碼，區分84個真正的特異性調控因子（基線表達較高）與11個表達偽影（靜息信號接近零，baseMean下限 = 8.3（全條件 Q25））,能視覺上區分真正的調控效應與技術噪聲。
zh.data_explanation: 此診斷圖以基線表達作為品質過濾條件，篩選真正的 CD4+ T細胞調控因子與偽信號。真正的特異性調控因子表現出實質的靜息表達並對刺激有強健的反應，而偽影則聚集於零附近的基線，並從微不足道的起始值產生膨脹的倍數變化。這種分離對於 Perturb-seq 篩選中的準確功能標註至關重要，確保下游調控預測反映生物學相關的擾動效應，而非測量噪聲。

raw_source: Perturbase platform methodology validation dataset; AUROC metrics from benchmark classification tasks, essential-gene depletion rates from control perturbations, and baseline-corrected expression or phenotype measurements from single-cell readouts

en.title: Perturb-seq Platform Validation: AUROC, Survivorship Bias Filtering, and Context-Specific Regulation
en.description: Three-panel figure validating perturb-seq methodology. Panel A shows an ROC curve demonstrating classifier performance (AUROC=0.85 vs random). Panel B is an XY scatter plot with LOEUF (y-axis) versus maximum cell count across conditions (x-axis), identifying essential genes (n=237, red, low LOEUF) that deplete below the n≥200 threshold, illustrating survivorship-bias filtering. Panel C is a scatter plot of context-specific differential expression versus baseline expression across all conditions, separating true regulators (n=84) from expression artifacts (n=11).
en.data_explanation: These validation panels establish the reliability of perturb-seq for discovering CD4+ T-cell regulators by filtering out technical artifacts and survivorship bias. Panel B removes genes lost due to viability dropout rather than true regulatory effects, ensuring only genes with sufficient cell recovery are analyzed. Panel C distinguishes genuine context-dependent regulators from spurious expression changes, enabling confident identification of perturbation targets that specifically control CD4+ T-cell biology.

zh.title: Perturb-seq 平台驗證：AUROC、存活者偏差篩選與脈絡特異性調控
zh.description: 三面板圖表驗證 perturb-seq 方法論。面板 A 展示 ROC 曲線，說明分類器效能（AUROC=0.85 對比隨機）。面板 B 為 XY 散點圖，以 LOEUF（y 軸）對比各條件下最大細胞計數（x 軸），識別必需基因（n=237，紅色，低 LOEUF）在 n≥200 閾值下耗盡，闡述存活者偏差篩選。面板 C 為脈絡特異性差異表現對比基準表現的散點圖（跨所有條件），區分真正調控因子（n=84）與表現假象（n=11）。
zh.data_explanation: 這些驗證面板透過篩除技術假象與存活者偏差，確立 perturb-seq 在發現 CD4+ T 細胞調控因子的可靠性。面板 B 排除因生存力下降而非真正調控效應喪失的基因，確保僅分析具備充分細胞回收的基因。面板 C 區分真正脈絡依賴的調控因子與虛假表現變化，使能自信地識別特異控制 CD4+ T 細胞生物學的擾動標靶。

raw_source: Perturbase platform dataset: CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq screens with single-cell transcriptomics readout; perturbation effect sizes ranked by statistical significance; cell-state annotations enabling conditional analysis across identified T-cell subpopulations and activation states.

en.title: Integrated Perturbation Analysis: Curation Pipeline and Context-Specific Target Effects
en.description: Five-panel figure integrating perturbation discovery and validation. Panel (a) shows a curation flowchart reducing 33,983 raw profiles through five sequential filters (≥200 cells, significant knockdown, no off-targets, ≥50 DE genes) to a 1,235-target shortlist spanning three regulatory modules (TCR, SAGA, Mediator). Panel (b) is a horizontal funnel bar chart tracking filter counts at each curation gate. Panel (c) is a hexbin density plot of DE gene count versus cells per target (Spearman ρ = −0.18). Panel (d) displays three node-link network diagrams (TCR proximal signalling, SAGA complex, Mediator CDK) with node size representing mean on-target effect magnitude. Panel (e) is a heatmap with dendrogram showing DE gene expression across resting and stimulated (8 hr and 48 hr) CD4+ T cells.
en.data_explanation: The curation pipeline identifies high-confidence CD4+ T-cell perturbation targets by enforcing stringent quality thresholds: adequate cell counts, significant knockdown efficacy, minimal off-target activity, and sufficient DE gene detection, yielding 1,235 validated targets from 33,983 initial profiles. The negative correlation between DE gene count and target cell coverage (ρ = −0.18) indicates that broader effects tend to be observed in smaller experimental cohorts, informing target prioritization. The three regulatory module networks and stimulus-response heatmap reveal context-specific target effects across TCR signalling, chromatin remodelling, and transcription regulation, directly enabling rational selection of CD4+ T-cell targets for therapeutic intervention.

zh.title: 整合擾動分析：策展流程與脈絡特異性靶標效應
zh.description: 五面板圖整合擾動發現與驗證。面板(a)展示策展流程圖，透過五個順序篩選(≥200 cells、顯著敲除、無脫靶、≥50 DE genes)將33,983個原始概況縮減至1,235個靶標短單，涵蓋三個調控模組(TCR、SAGA、Mediator)。面板(b)為水平漏斗條形圖，追蹤各策展閘口的篩選計數。面板(c)為DE gene數量與每靶標細胞數的hexbin密度圖(Spearman ρ = −0.18)。面板(d)展示三個node-link網路圖(TCR近端信號、SAGA complex、Mediator CDK)，節點大小代表平均脫靶效應幅度。面板(e)為含樹狀圖的heatmap，顯示靜息與刺激(8 hr與48 hr) CD4+ T細胞間的DE gene表現。
zh.data_explanation: 策展流程透過強制嚴格品質閾值來識別高信度CD4+ T細胞擾動靶標：充足細胞計數、顯著敲除效能、最少脫靶活性與充分DE gene偵測，從33,983個初始概況中產生1,235個驗證靶標。DE gene計數與靶標細胞涵蓋範圍間的負相關(ρ = −0.18)表明，在較小實驗隊列中往往觀察到更廣泛的效應，以此指導靶標優先序列化。三個調控模組網路與刺激反應heatmap揭示跨TCR信號、核質重塑與轉錄調控的脈絡特異性靶標效應，直接支援CD4+ T細胞靶標之理性選擇以用於治療介入。

raw_source: signed_ranking_v2.csv, downstream_enrichment_v2.csv, lincs_concordance.csv, track_a_gwas.csv, track_b_string.csv, track_c_gse318876.csv

en.title: Signed-DE application & external validation (7-panel)
en.description: Seven-panel composite figure. Panels cover: the signed directionality-index volcano/scatter separating net-derepressed vs net-reduced perturbations; a Reactome pathway bubble/dot-plot of downstream enrichment; an immune-genetics lollipop (Open Targets); STRING known-partner-recovery bars for flagship hubs; a GSE318876 HIV-screen null-result bar; and a LINCS sign-agreement lollipop.
en.data_explanation: Ties the platform's signed regulatory calls to downstream mechanism and to three independent external datasets (GWAS genetic association, STRING protein interactions, an orthogonal CD4+ CRISPR screen). It shows the ranking is corroborated by external evidence while honestly flagging that association is not causation and the HIV screen phenotype differs from T-cell activation.

zh.title: Signed-DE 應用與外部驗證（7 面板）
zh.description: 七面板複合圖表。各面板涵蓋：signed directionality-index 火山圖/散點圖區分 net-derepressed 與 net-reduced 擾動；Reactome 通路 bubble/dot-plot 呈現下游富集；免疫遺傳學 lollipop 圖（Open Targets）；STRING 已知配對恢復柱狀圖（主要樞紐）；GSE318876 HIV-screen 零假設柱狀圖；以及 LINCS sign-agreement lollipop 圖。
zh.data_explanation: 將平台的 signed regulatory calls 與下游機制及三組獨立外部資料集相連結（GWAS 遺傳關聯、STRING 蛋白質交互作用、正交 CD4+ CRISPR screen）。展示該排名經外部證據証實，同時坦誠指出關聯並非因果關係，且 HIV screen 表型異於 T-cell activation。

raw_source: downstream_enrichment_v2.csv (Reactome hypergeometric, detected background N=10,273)

en.title: Downstream Reactome pathway enrichment for 5 flagship perturbations
en.description: Five small-multiple grouped horizontal bar charts, one per flagship gene (CD3E, PLCG1, VAV1, STAT3, BCL10). Red bars = up-regulated downstream pathways (log2FC>0), blue bars = down-regulated pathways (log2FC<0); the x-axis is -log10 FDR (Reactome hypergeometric enrichment). No network/graph layout.
en.data_explanation: Shows which Reactome pathways are enriched among the up- vs down-regulated downstream genes of each flagship regulator's perturbation, against the detected-gene background. Up-regulated hits are dominated by broad immune categories (interferon signaling, neutrophil degranulation) while down-regulated hits include expression-related pathways (RNA metabolism, cell cycle) that are flagged as potential expression artifacts.

zh.title: 5個關鍵擾動的下游 Reactome 通路富集分析
zh.description: 五個小倍數分組水平長條圖，每個對應一個關鍵基因（CD3E、PLCG1、VAV1、STAT3、BCL10）。紅色長條 = 上調的下游通路（log2FC>0），藍色長條 = 下調的通路（log2FC<0）；x 軸為 -log10 FDR（Reactome 超幾何富集分析）。無網路／圖形佈局。
zh.data_explanation: 展示在每個關鍵調控因子擾動的上調與下調下游基因中富集的 Reactome 通路，以檢測到的基因背景為對照。上調命中主要由廣泛的免疫類別主導（干擾素信號傳遞、中性粒細胞顆粒釋放），而下調命中包含表達相關通路（RNA 代謝、細胞週期），這些被標記為潛在的表達製品。
